'''Ax Squadron''' was a [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]] that served with the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] [[Galactic Alliance Defense Force|Defense Force]]. Equipped with [[E-7 E-wing multi-role starfighter|E-wing escort starfighters]], the unit fought at the [[Battle of Tralus (Second Galactic Civil War)|Battle of Tralus]] during the [[Second Galactic Civil War]] in [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]].

{{Military-stub}}

*''[[Legacy of the Force: Betrayal]]'' {{1st}}
